title: Ryder Erickson
summary: May 7, 2018 Based in Unalakleet, AK, Iñupiaq singer-songwriter Ryder Erickson writes, records, and produces his own music. His guitar and vocals carry an emotional honesty and grit reminiscent of folk/rock artists from Bob Dylan to Damien Rice. Scandinavian on his father’s side and Native on his mot...
